# mailcow_rl_domain (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailcow_rl_domain" "example" {
  domain   = "example.com"
  rl_value = "100"
  rl_frame = "h"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Domain to apply the rate limit to
- `rl_frame` (String) Rate limit time frame: s (second), m (minute), h (hour)
- `rl_value` (String) Rate limit value (e.g. "10", "50")

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
